hero.label: // ENGAGEMENT PLANS
hero.title:
Flexible Plans.
Clear Scope.
Real Results.
hero.description: Choose the level of support that fits your idea. Whether you're starting small or building something more advanced, each plan is structured to deliver clarity, performance, and a smooth development process.

framework.title: Custom Project Framework
framework.description: All plans serve as a structured starting point. Final scope, features, and pricing may vary depending on your specific requirements and project complexity.

guidance.title: Not Sure Which Plan Fits?
guidance.description: Every project is different. If you're unsure which plan suits your idea, we'll help you define the right scope and recommend the most efficient approach.

engagementPlansPage.corePlanDescription: A practical website package designed for individuals who need a simple, professional online presence without advanced custom functionality.
engagementPlansPage.frameworkPlanDescription: A flexible website package designed for individuals who need more structure, customization, and room to grow.
engagementPlansPage.expansionPlanDescription: Designed for growing projects that require more functionality and flexibility.
engagementPlansPage.expansionPlanIncludedPageCount: Up to 10 custom pages or sections
engagementPlansPage.architecturePlanDescription: A comprehensive solution for complex projects that require custom functionality, flexibility, and long-term scalability.
engagementPlansPage.fullStackPlanDescription: A complete, high-end digital solution built from the ground up. Ideal for complex ideas requiring precision, scalability, and a fully tailored approach.
engagementPlansPage.fullStackPlanIncludedSolution: Fully custom web solution or application
engagementPlansPage.fullStackPlanIncludedDesign: Advanced UI/UX design and interaction logic

journalPage.heroDescription: From exploring hidden corners of iconic cities to understanding how to plan your journey more efficiently, each article is created to support both inspiration and decision-making.

closing.title: Have Something in Mind?
closing.description: Every project starts with an idea. We're here to help you shape it into something functional, structured, and ready to launch.

hero.label: // SELECTED WORK
hero.title: What We've Built
hero.description: Each project is built around a different idea, a different challenge, and a tailored solution. Here's a selection of what we've created — focused on functionality, clarity, and performance.

selectedWorkPage.personalPortfolioPlatformOverview: A clean, minimal portfolio designed for an individual showcasing creative work and services.
selectedWorkPage.personalPortfolioPlatformChallenge: The client needed a structured way to present their work without overwhelming visitors, while keeping the design refined and professional.
selectedWorkPage.personalPortfolioPlatformSolution: We developed a custom website with a clear layout, smooth navigation, and responsive design, ensuring content remained the focal point.
selectedWorkPage.ecommerceStoreForNicheProductsOverview: An online store built for a small niche product business, focused on simplicity and usability.
selectedWorkPage.ecommerceStoreForNicheProductsChallenge: Creating a seamless shopping experience without unnecessary complexity or a heavy interface.
selectedWorkPage.ecommerceStoreForNicheProductsSolution: We combined a streamlined product structure with an intuitive checkout flow that keeps the buying journey clear and efficient.
selectedWorkPage.serviceBasedWebsiteOverview: A multi-page website designed for an individual offering professional services.
selectedWorkPage.serviceBasedWebsiteChallenge: The client needed a clear way to communicate services and guide users toward inquiry or booking.
selectedWorkPage.serviceBasedWebsiteSolution: We structured the website with focused sections, strong visual hierarchy, and clear calls to action.
selectedWorkPage.webApplicationForBookingSystemOverview: A custom-built web application allowing users to manage bookings and sessions.
selectedWorkPage.webApplicationForBookingSystemChallenge: Developing a system that is easy to use while handling multiple interactions and user inputs.
selectedWorkPage.webApplicationForBookingSystemSolution: We created a structured backend with a simple front-end interface, making session management fast and flexible.
selectedWorkPage.websiteRedesignProjectOverview: A complete redesign of an outdated website that lacked structure and performance.
selectedWorkPage.websiteRedesignProjectChallenge: Improving usability and modernising the visual experience without losing existing content.
selectedWorkPage.websiteRedesignProjectSolution: We rebuilt the website with a new structure, improved navigation, and optimized performance.
selectedWorkPage.highPerformanceLandingPageOverview: A single-page solution designed to clearly present an idea and guide user action.
selectedWorkPage.highPerformanceLandingPageChallenge: Keeping the page simple while making it engaging and effective.
selectedWorkPage.highPerformanceLandingPageSolution: We focused on clarity, structured content, and smooth interaction to guide users naturally.

closing.title: Let's Build Something That Works for You
closing.description: Your idea deserves more than a template. We focus on building solutions that are structured, functional, and ready to perform.

hero.label: // WHAT WE BUILD
hero.title:
Solutions Built
Around Your Ideas
hero.description: We design and develop digital products tailored to individuals - combining functionality, performance, and refined design. Every solution is built with purpose, ensuring it not only looks right but works exactly as intended.

plans.label: // SITE
plans.title:
Choose the Right Way
to Get Started
plans.description: Every project is different. Whether you need a one-time solution or ongoing development support, our engagement plans are designed to fit your scope, timeline, and goals.

services.label: // SERVICES
services.title: What We Create
services.description: From simple websites to more advanced digital platforms, our solutions are designed to adapt to your goals. We focus on clarity, usability, and long-term performance - avoiding unnecessary complexity while delivering real results.

whatWeBuildPage.customWebsitesDescription: We create fully tailored websites designed around your vision and goals. Whether it's a personal project, portfolio, or service-based website, every detail is crafted to reflect your identity while maintaining usability and performance.
whatWeBuildPage.webApplicationsDescription: For more advanced needs, we build web applications that go beyond static pages. These solutions include custom functionality, user interactions, and system logic tailored to your specific requirements.
whatWeBuildPage.webApplicationsIncludedSecureLogic: Secure data handling and system logic
whatWeBuildPage.uiUxDesignDescription: Design is not just about appearance - it's about how your product works. We create interfaces that feel natural, structured, and easy to navigate, ensuring a smooth experience for every user.
whatWeBuildPage.ecommerceSolutionsDescription: We build online stores that are simple to manage and easy to use. The focus is on creating a seamless experience - from product browsing to checkout - while ensuring stability and performance.
whatWeBuildPage.landingPagesDescription: Landing pages are designed with one goal in mind - clear communication and focused action. We create pages that guide users naturally, without distraction or unnecessary elements.
whatWeBuildPage.websiteRedesignDescription: If your current website no longer reflects your vision or performs effectively, we help transform it into a modern, structured, and efficient product.
whatWeBuildPage.performanceOptimizationDescription: Speed and performance directly impact user experience. We analyze and improve your website or application to ensure it runs efficiently and reliably.
whatWeBuildPage.maintenanceSupportDescription: Digital products require ongoing care. We provide continuous support to keep your project secure, updated, and functioning without interruptions.
